FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Interface IClipboard

Namespace
FluentGpu.Pal
Assembly
FluentGpu.Pal.dll

The system-clipboard seam (plain Unicode text, the TextBox cut/copy/paste contract). UI-thread only. SequenceNumber is the OS clipboard epoch (Win32 GetClipboardSequenceNumber) — context menus gate their Paste item on it changing instead of polling content (the ISystemColors versioned-external-store idiom).

public interface IClipboard

Properties

SequenceNumber

The OS clipboard change epoch — bumps on every clipboard write (by anyone).

uint SequenceNumber { get; }

Property Value

uint

Methods

SetText(ReadOnlySpan<char>)

Replace the clipboard content with plain Unicode text.

void SetText(ReadOnlySpan<char> text)

Parameters

text ReadOnlySpan<char>

TryGetText(out string)

Read the clipboard as plain Unicode text. False when empty or not text-convertible.

bool TryGetText(out string text)

Parameters

text string

Returns

bool
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
